introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 个体或性状值中的加性遗传贡献。

introduced_concepts.name: Likelihood
introduced_concepts.definition: A measure of how well a model explains observed data.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量模型解释观测数据程度的量。

introduced_concepts.name: Time
introduced_concepts.definition: A quantity indexing the stage, generation, or interval of the process.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 表示过程所处阶段、世代或时间间隔的量。

introduced_concepts.name: Population Size
introduced_concepts.definition: The number of individuals or gene copies represented by the population model.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 模型中表示的个体数或基因拷贝数。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Formula 12.15c Relationship
prerequisite_concepts.definition: Taking and noting from a first-order Taylor series that (12.15c) returns Equation 12.15a.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 这条关系式把左侧目标量和右侧条件连接起来，适合作为理解本公式符号关系的起点。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Formula 12.15a Relationship
prerequisite_concepts.definition: By noting that (12.15a) recovers the previous expression (Equation 12.10) for under drift and mutation.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 这条关系式把左侧目标量和右侧条件连接起来，适合作为理解本公式符号关系的起点。

introduced_concepts.name: E
introduced_concepts.definition: Taking and noting from a first-order Taylor series that (12.15c) returns Equation 12.15a.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: E 帮你把符号放回模型语境中：它标记的是公式正在描述的对象、类别或条件。

introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 模型中表示的个体数或基因拷贝数。

introduced_concepts.name: Variance
introduced_concepts.definition: A measure of spread around the mean.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量一个量围绕平均值分散程度的指标。

introduced_concepts.name: Order Term
introduced_concepts.definition: A remainder term describing the asymptotic size of an expression.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 描述表达式渐近规模的余项。

introduced_concepts.name: Time
introduced_concepts.definition: A quantity indexing the stage, generation, or interval of the process.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 表示过程所处阶段、世代或时间间隔的量。

introduced_concepts.name: Alpha
introduced_concepts.definition: A model parameter or distribution-shape parameter named alpha in the local context.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 局部模型中记为 alpha 的参数或分布形状参数。

introduced_concepts.name: Formula 12.34d Distance
introduced_concepts.definition: A measure of separation between states, values, or functions.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量状态、数值或函数之间分离程度的量。

introduced_concepts.name: Formula 12.34d Index
introduced_concepts.definition: A position marker used to identify a class, state, or summation term.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 用于标记类别、状态或求和项位置的下标。

introduced_concepts.name: Formula 12.34d Rate
introduced_concepts.definition: A parameter describing how quickly a process occurs.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 描述某个过程发生快慢的参数。

introduced_concepts.name: F Sub 1-alpha/2,1,k-1
introduced_concepts.definition: F Sub 1-alpha/2,1,k-1 places the symbol back in the model context: it marks the object, class, or condition being described.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: F Sub 1-alpha/2,1,k-1 帮你把符号放回模型语境中：它标记的是公式正在描述的对象、类别或条件。
